properties.name: Castle Archdale Country Park
properties.description: A sprawling lakeside park with a WWII history trail, a fantastic adventure playground, and plenty of woodland paths for cycling and walking.

properties.name: The Round 'O' Jetty
properties.description: A perfect family spot in Enniskillen with a large playground, open green spaces, and a chance to watch the boats on the Erne. Great for a picnic!
